allow: PowerShell($lines = Get-Content -Path index.html -Encoding utf8; $head = $lines[0..8]; $middle = $lines[1959..2192]; $tail = $lines[4224..\($lines.Count-1\)]; $newLines = @\(\); $newLines += $head; $newLines += '  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/tokens.css">'; $newLines += '  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/styles.css">'; $newLines += $middle; $newLines += '  <script src="js/app.js"></script>'; $newLines += $tail; $content = \($newLines -join "`r`n"\) + "`r`n"; $utf8NoBom = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $false; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\(\(Resolve-Path index.html\), $content, $utf8NoBom\); \(Get-Item index.html\).Length)
